action.content: You are currently editing backend files (`smart-gym-system/src/gym_management_portal_handler.py` or `smart-gym-system/src/datatypes.py`). Changing these files may affect the frontend API client. Once you have finished your backend changes, you MUST check if `portal-app/src/services/portalApi.ts` or `portal-app/src/types.ts` need corresponding updates to remain in sync with the backend routes and data structures.
